name: Fatal Stealth
additional_info: Grants a 0.2% damage buff to attacks that hit your opponent's back for every 1% stealth you have. This only works on stealth gained from Equipment or Outfit sources. Felinor's innate stealth multiplier has no effect on this. This does not work on assassinations.
desc: You deal increased backstab damage to opponents based on how high your stealth stat currently is.
